description_long: This is a packaged croissant snack from the brand Faragello, presented in a blue plastic wrapper. The front of the package features a large, appetizing image of a croissant with a visible chocolate filling, along with the brand name and product description in bold white and red text. The back of the package displays nutritional information, ingredients, and other product details in white text against the blue background. The sides of the package are narrow and show barcode and recycling symbols. The packaging appears to be airtight, keeping the croissant fresh inside. The overall appearance is typical of single-serving, pre-packaged pastries found in convenience stores or vending machines.
description: A blue plastic-wrapped Faragello croissant snack with chocolate filling, featuring bold branding and product imagery on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow edge of the blue plastic package, with barcode and some text visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the Faragello branding, a large image of a chocolate-filled croissant, and product information.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow edge of the package with some text and symbols.
description_view_3: Back view with detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and other product details in white text on blue.
